message:
feat(session): implement Session.merge() for detached objects

Adds Session.merge() method to reattach detached or externally-created
objects to the session. The merge operation:

1. If object with same PK exists in session: Updates the tracked object
   with values from the provided object and marks it dirty.

2. If load=true and object not in session: Queries the database for
   an existing row, merges the provided values onto it, and tracks it.

3. If object not in session or DB: Treats it as new (will INSERT on flush).

Also adds convenience method merge_without_load() for the common case
of merging without database lookup.

Includes 6 unit tests covering all merge scenarios.

Closes: bd-264

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
